india_trends.title: Beware! Finance Secretary Nagaraju warns banks about risk from Mythos
india_trends.summary: Indian financial authorities are alerting banks to the significant risks from advanced AI models. india_trends.title: Rupee gains sharply as oil slides, NDF dollar selling gathers pace
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee turned sharply higher on Thursday afternoon, ​boosted by a slump in ​crude oil prices, with stop-losses on short rupee wagers and ​dollar sales in the non-deliverable forward market also lifting the currency, traders said.

india_trends.title: Nifty is stuck, but the broader market isn't; Vinay Rajani explains what's really happening
india_trends.summary: India's Nifty 50 index is trading in a narrow range. However, midcap and smallcap indices are reaching new highs. Foreign institutional investors are not actively participating in large-cap stocks. This is causing the Nifty to underperform global markets. Analysts see a credible breakout in the Nift

india_trends.title: LIC Portfolio Rejig: SBI, Coal India among top 10 stocks that India's biggest DII sold in March quarter
india_trends.summary: During the quarter under review, LIC’s share in NSE-listed stocks declined marginally to 3.71% as on March 31, 2026, from 3.72% in value terms, as the Indian stock market witnessed a steep selloff due to the Middle East war that resulted in a steep spike in crude oil prices.

india_trends.title: Realty Income lifts 2026 AFFO forecast on strong demand, increased investment activity
india_trends.summary: Realty Income on Wednesday raised ​its annual adjusted funds ​from operations (FFO) forecast, citing strong demand ​and increased investment activity.

india_trends.title: NeoLiv will invest Rs 500 crore to develop 47 acres golf-led luxury plotted township in Faridabad
india_trends.summary: A real estate firm has achieved Rs 1,251 crore in sales by launching 285 premium plots in Faridabad, with prices ranging from Rs 2.88 crore to Rs 9.94 crore. Developed under a management contract, the project is slated for completion by March 2031. This success highlights Faridabad's growing appeal

india_trends.title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 hits record high on US-Iran deal hopes; SoftBank, Seiko Epson lead the rally
india_trends.summary: Japanese stocks surged on May 7, with the Nikkei 225 rising 5.58% to a record high, fueled by optimism over US-Iran negotiations and strong tech earnings. SoftBank led gains, climbing 18.44%, as semiconductor stocks also performed well, indicating a bullish trend in the market.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 7: Godrej Industries, Tejas Networks, Paytm, Polycab, BHEL, HFCL among top gainers
india_trends.summary: Indian stocks closed largely unchanged on May 7, after early gains, influenced by profit booking despite easing tensions between the US and Iran. Broader market indices like Nifty Midcap 100 and Nifty Smallcap 100 showed gains, while sector performance was mixed.

india_trends.summary: Brigade Enterprises approved a 1:3 bonus share issue alongside its Q4 FY26 results and final dividend announcement. Despite the corporate action, weak quarterly earnings pressured the stock, which fell nearly 5%. The company reported lower profit and revenue, while maintaining strong long-term share

india_trends.title: Stock market today: Sensex falls 114 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,300; mid, small-cap indices jump 1%
india_trends.summary: The Sensex fell 114 points, or 0.15%, to end at 77,844.52, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,326.65, down 4 points, or 0.02%.
